message:
🐛 Fix rocket scroll: PTY-level backpressure + viewport scroll lock (#185)

Two fixes for intermittent rocket scroll during heavy AI CLI output:

1. Server: PTY-level backpressure — call pty.pause()/resume() instead of
   silently dropping data. Buffer in-flight events and flush on resume.
   Resume PTY on WebSocket close to prevent stale pauses.

2. Client: viewport scroll lock — when a RAF-batched write contains
   screen-clearing ANSI sequences, freeze the xterm-viewport during
   term.write() to prevent intermediate rendering from bouncing the
   scroll position. Snap to bottom in the write callback if user was
   following output.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
